changelogs.title: The 'Tear Down and Rebuild' update
changes: Tore down the site and rebuilt it page by page
Made system pages, site info, and guides editable (except for a select few)
Changed how the editor works foundationally, making many QOLs and features possible
Implemented a better authentication system
Added a way to view the history of a page, who changed it, and who accepted the revision
Made the admin panel actually usable and functional
Added a way for reviewers to intercept a revision to fix things such as grammar or formatting errors (trust-based system)
Highlighted the changes in a submission (diff view)
Fixed smart merge being admin-exclusive
Added the 'Trusted Editor' role to the site with benefits
Improved Local Drafts so that it won't create new redundant tabs, alongside a better saving system
Fixed a bug where auto-save would wipe everything
Fixed lazy rendering somehow not working with videos, causing video-heavy pages to slow down
Moved to a modular CSS styling architecture
Reworked the right sidebar that is used for quick navigation
Appropriate color accents now apply based on the character color code
Added 'Pick if you like vs Avoid if you dislike' table to every character page
Made Accordion an actual thing that can be used
Improved the Divider component
Added a way to caption videos
Made webm/mp4 supported in the skill entry
Added Damage Type Metadata to skill entry
Added quick keys/combos for styling stuff
Added a time passed stat to submissions
Opening a ticket now auto-moves you to that ticket to start reviewing
Reworded and explained the Confidence level better
Added Writing Guide to Site Info pages
Renamed Disaster Plant to Disaster Plants
Spent money on Supabase so everything won't be gone

changelogs.title: The 'free labor and gay' update
changes: Touched up all of the Foundation of the Site
Boomcat is never coming back ngl

ngl i want to blow my head off with a shotgun
Add Gay Standard, Happy Pride Month!!!

changelogs.title: The 'finally ready' update
changes: Touched up all of the Foundation of the Site
Added all the entries for every system pages, site info, and guides, but they are empty for now (Beside the Tier List)
Implement the Tier Lists: it has an Overall Ranking which is a placeholder (by Air Putrifier) for now, and 20 incompleted matchup specific lists
Added Nickolas4F entries for Head of the Hei's Overview, Matchups, and Counterplay.
Added Nickolas4F entries for Salaryman's Overview, Matchups, and Counterplay.
Added Nickolas4F entries for Locust Guy's Overview, Matchups, and Counterplay.
Added a completed entry (all the frame data, and details) for Cursed Strikes which will act as the GOLD STANDARD of the site
Added Air Putrifier entries for Black Death's skills' overview and special's overview
Added Air Putrifier entries for Cursed Partners' skills' overview and specials' overview
Decided on the matchup tiers for every Nickolas4F matchup wiki entries (Head of the Hei, Switcher, Locust Guy, and Salaryman)
Added all the skills, M1s, and specials entries for all the empty character pages
Added all the character portraits
Convert all media resources on the site to WebP and WebM form to save storage and bandwidth
Added a new warning system to the site
Improve and Optimize the site Loading process
Added two centralized dashboards: Side Dashboard and Character Dashboard, to help with navigation and info dumping in the foreseeable future
Added a completed entry (all the frame data, and details) for Cursed Strikes which will act as the GOLD STANDARD of the site
Boomcat is coming back
